diffs.diff:
--- a/test_gpu.py
+++ b/test_gpu.py
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+import torch

+torch.backends.cudnn.enabled = False

+device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+print(f'Using {device}')

+

+# Linear

+x = torch.randn(4, 96, 7, device=device)

+linear = torch.nn.Linear(7, 256).to(device)

+out = linear(x)

+print('Linear forward OK')

+

+# Conv1d

+conv = torch.nn.Conv1d(7, 64, 3, padding=1).to(device)

+x_conv = x.permute(0, 2, 1)

+out_conv = conv(x_conv)

+print('Conv1d forward OK')

+

+# TransformerEncoderLayer

+encoder_layer = torch.nn.TransformerEncoderLayer(d_model=7, nhead=1, batch_first=True).to(device)

+out_enc = encoder_layer(x)

+print('TransformerEncoderLayer OK')

+

+# Matmul

+a = torch.randn(2, 2, device=device)

+b = torch.randn(2, 2, device=device)

+c = torch.matmul(a, b)

+print('Matmul OK')

+

+print('All ops OK on GPU')
